internal_notification_en: No current network issue detected. No action is required.
High latency has been detected. Please check current network congestion.
Weak signal has been detected in one area. Please inspect coverage and signal quality.
Network congestion has been detected. Please monitor load and redistribute resources.
High packet loss has been detected. Please inspect connection stability and routing path.
Service degradation has been detected. Please inspect key QoS metrics and address the root cause.
Alert: A possible or actual outage has been detected. Immediate action and a critical ticket are required.
Maintenance activity may affect service quality. Please monitor execution and updates.
An unstable connection has been detected. Please review jitter, packet loss, and latency metrics.
Proactive alert: The model predicts a possible upcoming network issue. Please take preventive action.
